```esql
TS k8s
| WHERE cluster == "prod"
| METRICS_INFO
| KEEP metric_name, metric_type
| SORT metric_name
```

| metric_name:keyword | metric_type:keyword |
| --- | --- |
| network.eth0.rx | gauge |
| network.eth0.tx | gauge |
| network.total_bytes_in | counter |
| network.total_cost | counter |
